This GO-14 Medium Tote is crafted from exquisite sheepskin leather, featuring a quilted pattern inspired by the brand's traditional luggage design. The Twist lock adds a striking touch, while the top handle can be carried alone or converted into a leather shoulder pad with a sliding chain strap for a comfortable shoulder or crossbody experience.
Dimensions: 23 x 16 x 10cm

M12019 This Lockit BB Bag draws inspiration from the 1960s Knick-Knack Bag, offering flexible carrying options. The Monogram coated canvas features a curved top edge and oval trim, highlighting classic design elements. The lock closure pays homage to the brand's heritage.

items.name_en: Dynamic Chip M45256 Black M45306 Blue M46526 Milky White Top-tier Original M45307 Milky White with Brown Top-tier Original NéoNoé Medium Tote Bag Crafted from Monogram Empreinte embossed leather, it exudes elegance with leather drawstrings and delicate eyelets. The lightweight structure fits the body's rhythm, cleverly using a removable top handle or detachable and adjustable shoulder strap for a comfortable experience whether carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.

items.name_cn:
【Dynamic Chip 1st Tier Original】
Top-grain Leather M45958 Medium Dauphine Handbag M44391: A new addition to the Louis Vuitton classic Dauphine Handbag series from the 2019 Pre-Fall collection. An updated design by Women's Artistic Director Nicolas Ghesquière. Combines Monogram canvas with Monogram Reverse canvas, featuring a chain strap and magnetic closure, showcasing the brand's tradition with a modern style and full of Louis Vuitton fashion flair. Dimensions: 25.0 x 17.0 x 10.5 cm (L x H x W)

Top-grain Leather M45959 Small Dauphine Handbag M44580: Nicolas Ghesquière launched the new Mini Dauphine Handbag for Spring/Summer 2019. The mini design fuses Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas with calfskin trim. The LV lock shines brightly, while the leather shoulder strap creates a modern look. Suitable for day and night wear. Dimensions: 20.0 x 15.0 x 9.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: 【Dynamic Change Chip Top Quality Original Batch】
items.name_cn:
【Dynamic Change Chip Top Quality Original Batch】
💀Model M11946 Black💞 M12061 Brown M12061 Apricot M11946 Rose M40995 Double-sided Tote Bag. This legendary Neverfull Medium Bag always meets all your tote needs. Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, suitable for home and travel. Tighten the side drawstrings to instantly transform into a stylish city bag. Loosen the drawstrings to become a chic and practical tote. The long leather handle is suitable for shoulder or arm carry. This model is made of damier azur canvas. Dimensions: 31x28x14cm

Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, suitable for home and travel. Tighten the side drawstrings to instantly transform into a stylish city bag. Loosen the drawstrings to become a chic and practical tote. The long leather handle is suitable for shoulder or arm carry. This model is made of damier azur canvas. Dimensions: 31x28x14cm
